validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/services/__tests__/mfa.service.management.test.ts src/modules/auth/__tests__/mfa-management.router.test.ts src/modules/auth/__tests__/auth.router.test.ts src/modules/auth/__tests__/auth.router.additional.test.ts && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec vitest run src/app/settings/security/mfa/__tests__/management.test.tsx src/app/settings/security/mfa/__tests__/page.test.tsx

notes: MFA management dashboard with disable/regenerate flows. Setup wizard moved to /mfa/setup sub-route. verifyTotpTimingSafe replaces timing-unsafe verifyTotp. Rate limiting at 3 attempts per 15 minutes.
